title: Fix Grouping Row Wrapping on Small Screen Resolutions
story: As a DataTools Pro user on a smaller screen, I want the grouping row to display correctly without wrapping, so the table remains readable at all resolutions.
description: Bug fix: when testing at a smaller screen resolution, the grouping row text was wrapping and breaking the table layout. Fixed the CSS to prevent wrapping on group rows.
acceptance_criteria: Grouping rows do not wrap on small screen resolutions
Table layout remains clean and readable at all viewport sizes
ux_changes: Fixed CSS to prevent grouping row text wrapping on smaller screens.
implementation_notes: Applied CSS white-space/overflow rules to grouping row elements to prevent wrapping at smaller viewports.
